title: viguiera latibracteata
intro: Viguiera latibracteata, also known as the shrubby groundsel, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. Viguiera latibracteata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
